title: Sergei Markoff
text: Home * People * Sergei Markoff Sergei S. Markoff [1] Sergei S. Markoff , [2] a Russian computer scientist, computer chess and games programmer. He is author of the chess program SmarThink [3] [4] . In 2003 Sergei introduced the Botvinnik-Markoff Extension [5] . Sergei working in Sberbank leading a workgroup that focused on development of bank AI/ML systems especially in the area of speech technologies. [6] .
